'''鈭歭-g-j''' ('''kalagaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lugow|lugow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lugow|lugow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-g-j
|-
! Lemma
| kalagaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilagaj|thilagaj]] || [[word:jilagaj|jilagaj]] || [[word:shilagaj|shilagaj]] || [[word:kilagaj|kilagaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulagaj|thuthulagaj]] || [[word:jujulagaj|jujulagaj]] || [[word:shushulagaj|shushulagaj]] || [[word:kukulagaj|kukulagaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulagaj|thulagaj]] || [[word:julagaj|julagaj]] || [[word:shulagaj|shulagaj]] || [[word:kulagaj|kulagaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulagaj|thulagaj]] || [[word:julagaj|julagaj]] || [[word:shulagaj|shulagaj]] || [[word:kulagaj|kulagaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelagaj|thelagaj]] || [[word:jelagaj|jelagaj]] || [[word:shelagaj|shelagaj]] || [[word:kelagaj|kelagaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholagaj|thotholagaj]] || [[word:jojolagaj|jojolagaj]] || [[word:shosholagaj|shosholagaj]] || [[word:kokolagaj|kokolagaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholagaj|tholagaj]] || [[word:jolagaj|jolagaj]] || [[word:sholagaj|sholagaj]] || [[word:kolagaj|kolagaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholagaj|tholagaj]] || [[word:jolagaj|jolagaj]] || [[word:sholagaj|sholagaj]] || [[word:kolagaj|kolagaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lagaj|th忙lagaj]] || [[word:j忙lagaj|j忙lagaj]] || [[word:sh忙lagaj|sh忙lagaj]] || [[word:k忙lagaj|k忙lagaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalagaj|thathalagaj]] || [[word:jajalagaj|jajalagaj]] || [[word:shashalagaj|shashalagaj]] || [[word:kakalagaj|kakalagaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalagaj|thalagaj]] || [[word:jalagaj|jalagaj]] || [[word:shalagaj|shalagaj]] || [[word:kalagaj|kalagaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalagaj|thalagaj]] || [[word:jalagaj|jalagaj]] || [[word:shalagaj|shalagaj]] || [[word:kalagaj|kalagaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalagaj|shalagaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalagaj|goshalagaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalagaj|gokishalagaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalagajn眉|shalagajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalagajnkn眉|goshalagajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagajn眉|gokishalagajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalagajsh毛|shalagajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalagajnksh毛|goshalagajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalagajsh毛|gokishalagajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagajro|shalagajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagajnkro|goshalagajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagajro|gokishalagajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagajmu|shalagajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagajnkmu|goshalagajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagajmu|gokishalagajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalagajsher|shalagajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalagajnksher|goshalagajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalagajsher|gokishalagajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalagajng|shalagajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalagajnkng|goshalagajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalagajng|gokishalagajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalagajya|shalagajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalagajnkya|goshalagajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalagajya|gokishalagajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalagajyam|shalagajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalagajnkyam|goshalagajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalagajyam|gokishalagajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagajn眉sh毛|shalagajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagajnkn眉sh毛|goshalagajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagajn眉sh毛|gokishalagajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagajn眉ro|shalagajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagajnkn眉ro|goshalagajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagajn眉ro|gokishalagajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagajn眉mu|shalagajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagajnkn眉mu|goshalagajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagajn眉mu|gokishalagajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagajsh毛n眉|shalagajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagajnksh毛n眉|goshalagajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagajsh毛n眉|gokishalagajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagajsh毛ro|shalagajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagajnksh毛ro|goshalagajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagajsh毛ro|gokishalagajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagajsh毛mu|shalagajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagajnksh毛mu|goshalagajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagajsh毛mu|gokishalagajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagajron眉|shalagajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagajnkron眉|goshalagajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagajron眉|gokishalagajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagajrosh毛|shalagajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagajnkrosh毛|goshalagajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagajrosh毛|gokishalagajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalagajromu|shalagajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalagajnkromu|goshalagajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalagajromu|gokishalagajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalagajmun眉|shalagajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalagajnkmun眉|goshalagajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalagajmun眉|gokishalagajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalagajmush毛|shalagajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalagajnkmush毛|goshalagajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalagajmush毛|gokishalagajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalagajmuro|shalagajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalagajnkmuro|goshalagajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalagajmuro|gokishalagajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
